arts.sum: Updates from a tantalising final round of games Manchester City v Club Brugge – live updates Live scoreboard | Who needs what | Email Scott Welcome to chaos. There are 36 clubs playing 18 fixtures to determine which eight qualify automatically for the Round of 16 and which 16 go into the play-off round.
